name: Amazon
description: Amazon.com, Inc. is an American multinational technology company focusing on e-commerce, cloud computing, online advertising, digital streaming, and artificial intelligence.

name: Atlassian
description: Atlassian develops collaboration and productivity software for software teams and enterprises.

name: Google
description: Google LLC is an American multinational technology company focusing on search engine technology, online advertising, cloud computing, computer software, quantum computing, e-commerce, and artificial intelligence.

name: HSBC
description: HSBC Holdings plc is a British universal bank and financial services holding company headquartered in London.

name: IBM
description: International Business Machines Corporation is an American multinational technology company headquartered in Armonk, New York.

name: Meta
description: Meta Platforms, Inc. is an American multinational technology conglomerate that owns and operates Facebook, Instagram, Threads, and WhatsApp.

name: Microsoft
description: Microsoft Corporation is an American multinational technology corporation which produces computer software, consumer electronics, personal computers, and related services.

name: Salesforce
description: Salesforce, Inc. is an American cloud-based software company headquartered in San Francisco, California, providing customer relationship management software and applications.

name: Shopify
description: Shopify provides commerce infrastructure for merchants to start, run, and grow online businesses.

name: Siemens
description: Siemens AG is a German multinational conglomerate corporation and the largest industrial manufacturing company in Europe.

name: Toyota
description: Toyota Motor Corporation is a Japanese multinational automotive manufacturer headquartered in Toyota City, Aichi, Japan.

name: Unilever
description: Unilever plc is a British multinational consumer goods company headquartered in London, England.

name: Apple
description: Apple Inc. is an American multinational technology company headquartered in Cupertino, California, that designs, develops, and sells consumer electronics, computer software, and online services.

name: Netflix
description: Netflix, Inc. is an American subscription video on-demand over-the-top streaming service and production company headquartered in Los Gatos, California.

name: Oracle
description: Oracle Corporation is an American multinational computer technology company headquartered in Austin, Texas, offering cloud computing, database software, and enterprise software products.

name: SAP
description: SAP SE is a German multinational software corporation headquartered in Walldorf, Baden-Wurttemberg, Germany that makes enterprise software to manage business operations and customer relations.

name: Adobe
description: Adobe Inc. is an American multinational computer software company headquartered in San Jose, California, known for Photoshop, Acrobat, Creative Cloud, and digital marketing solutions.

name: Intel
description: Intel Corporation is an American multinational corporation and technology company headquartered in Santa Clara, California, the world's largest semiconductor chip manufacturer by revenue.

name: NVIDIA
description: NVIDIA Corporation is an American multinational technology company incorporated in Delaware and based in Santa Clara, California, designing graphics processing units and system on chips.

name: Cisco
description: Cisco Systems, Inc. is an American multinational digital communications technology conglomerate corporation headquartered in San Jose, California, known for networking hardware, software, and services.

name: Qualcomm
description: Qualcomm Incorporated is an American multinational corporation headquartered in San Diego, California, that creates semiconductors, software, and services related to wireless technology.

name: AMD
description: Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. (AMD) is an American multinational semiconductor company headquartered in Santa Clara, California, developing computer processors and related technologies.

name: Uber
description: Uber Technologies, Inc. is an American multinational transportation company headquartered in San Francisco, California, offering ride-hailing, food delivery, and freight services globally.

name: Airbnb
description: Airbnb, Inc. is an American San Francisco-based company operating an online marketplace for short-term homestays and experiences, connecting hosts with guests worldwide.

name: Spotify
description: Spotify Technology S.A. is a Swedish audio streaming and media services provider founded in 2006, offering music, podcasts, and audiobooks to users worldwide.

name: LinkedIn
description: LinkedIn is an American business and employment-focused social media platform owned by Microsoft, with headquarters in Sunnyvale, California, serving over 900 million professionals worldwide.

name: Samsung
description: Samsung Electronics Co., Ltd. is a South Korean multinational semiconductor and electronics corporation headquartered in Suwon, Gyeonggi-do, South Korea, one of the world's largest technology companies.

name: Sony
description: Sony Group Corporation is a Japanese multinational conglomerate corporation headquartered in Minato, Tokyo, Japan, operating in electronics, gaming, music, movies, and financial services.

name: JPMorgan Chase
description: JPMorgan Chase and Co. is an American multinational investment bank and financial services holding company headquartered in New York City, the largest bank in the United States.

name: Goldman Sachs
description: The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. is an American multinational investment banking and financial services company headquartered in New York City, offering investment banking, securities, and asset management.

name: Citigroup
description: Citigroup Inc. or Citi is an American multinational investment banking and financial services company headquartered in New York City, serving over 200 million customer accounts in more than 160 countries.

name: Bank of America
description: Bank of America Corporation is an American multinational investment banking and financial services holding company headquartered in Charlotte, North Carolina, serving individuals, small businesses, and large corporations.

name: Visa
description: Visa Inc. is an American multinational payment card services corporation headquartered in San Francisco, California, facilitating electronic funds transfers throughout the world.

name: Mastercard
description: Mastercard Incorporated is an American multinational financial services corporation headquartered in Purchase, New York, providing transaction processing and other payment-related products and services.

name: PayPal
description: PayPal Holdings, Inc. is an American multinational financial technology company operating an online payments system headquartered in San Jose, California, enabling digital and mobile payments worldwide.

name: American Express
description: American Express Company (Amex) is an American multinational financial services corporation headquartered in New York City, known for its credit card, charge card, and traveler's cheque businesses.

name: BlackRock
description: BlackRock, Inc. is an American multinational investment management corporation based in New York City, the world's largest asset manager with over 10 trillion dollars in assets under management.

name: Morgan Stanley
description: Morgan Stanley is an American multinational investment management and financial services company headquartered in New York City, providing investment banking, securities, wealth management, and investment management services.

name: Walmart
description: Walmart Inc. is an American multinational retail corporation headquartered in Bentonville, Arkansas, operating a chain of hypermarkets, discount department stores, and grocery stores.

name: IKEA
description: IKEA is a Swedish-founded, Dutch-headquartered multinational conglomerate that designs and sells ready-to-assemble furniture, kitchen appliances, and home accessories, among other useful goods.

name: Nike
description: Nike, Inc. is an American multinational corporation headquartered near Beaverton, Oregon, engaged in the design, development, manufacturing, and worldwide marketing and sales of footwear, apparel, and equipment.

name: Adidas
description: Adidas AG is a German athletic apparel and footwear corporation headquartered in Herzogenaurach, Bavaria, Germany, designing and manufacturing shoes, clothing, and accessories.

name: Inditex
description: Industria de Diseno Textil, S.A. (Inditex) is a Spanish multinational clothing company headquartered in Arteixo, Galicia, Spain, known for its flagship brand Zara, one of the world's largest fashion retailers.

name: Volkswagen
description: Volkswagen AG is a German multinational automotive manufacturer headquartered in Wolfsburg, Germany, one of the world's largest automakers by sales, owning brands such as VW, Audi, Porsche, and Lamborghini.

name: Mercedes-Benz
description: Mercedes-Benz Group AG is a German multinational automotive corporation headquartered in Stuttgart, Baden-Wurttemberg, Germany, known for luxury vehicles, buses, coaches, and trucks.

name: BMW
description: Bayerische Motoren Werke AG (BMW) is a German multinational manufacturer of luxury vehicles and motorcycles headquartered in Munich, Bavaria, Germany.

name: Ford
description: Ford Motor Company is an American multinational automobile manufacturer headquartered in Dearborn, Michigan, known for producing and selling automobiles and commercial vehicles under the Ford brand.

name: General Motors
description: General Motors Company (GM) is an American multinational automotive manufacturing company headquartered in Detroit, Michigan, operating under Chevrolet, Buick, Cadillac, and GMC brands.

name: Tesla
description: Tesla, Inc. is an American multinational automotive and clean energy company headquartered in Austin, Texas, designing and manufacturing electric vehicles, battery energy storage, and solar products.

name: Honda
description: Honda Motor Co., Ltd. is a Japanese public multinational conglomerate manufacturer of automobiles, motorcycles, and power equipment, headquartered in Minato, Tokyo, Japan.

name: Shell
description: Shell plc is a British multinational oil and gas company headquartered in London, England, one of the largest companies in the world by revenue, operating across upstream, downstream, and integrated gas segments.

name: BP
description: BP p.l.c. is a British multinational oil and gas company headquartered in London, England, one of the world's seven supermajor oil and gas companies, operating across more than 70 countries.

name: ExxonMobil
description: ExxonMobil Corporation is an American multinational oil and gas corporation headquartered in Spring, Texas, one of the largest publicly traded companies by revenue.

name: TotalEnergies
description: TotalEnergies SE is a French multinational integrated energy company headquartered in Courbevoie, France, producing and marketing energies including oil, natural gas, and low-carbon electricity.

name: Chevron
description: Chevron Corporation is an American multinational energy corporation headquartered in San Ramon, California, actively engaged in every aspect of the oil and gas industry globally.

name: Johnson & Johnson
description: Johnson and Johnson is an American multinational pharmaceutical, medical devices, and consumer packaged goods manufacturing corporation headquartered in New Brunswick, New Jersey.

name: Pfizer
description: Pfizer Inc. is an American multinational pharmaceutical and biotechnology corporation headquartered in New York City, one of the world's largest pharmaceutical companies.

name: Roche
description: Roche Holding AG is a Swiss multinational healthcare company headquartered in Basel, Switzerland, operating worldwide in pharmaceuticals and diagnostics.

name: Novartis
description: Novartis AG is a Swiss multinational pharmaceutical corporation headquartered in Basel, Switzerland, one of the largest pharmaceutical companies in the world by market capitalization.

name: AstraZeneca
description: AstraZeneca plc is a British-Swedish multinational pharmaceutical and biopharmaceutical company headquartered in Cambridge, England, focused on discovery, development, and commercialisation of prescription medicines.

name: Abbott
description: Abbott Laboratories is an American multinational medical devices and health care company headquartered in Abbott Park, Illinois, operating in diagnostics, medical devices, nutrition, and pharmaceuticals.

name: Merck
description: Merck and Co., Inc. is an American multinational pharmaceutical company headquartered in Rahway, New Jersey, one of the largest pharmaceutical companies in the world, known for vaccines and biologic therapies.

name: Nestle
description: Nestle S.A. is a Swiss multinational food and drink processing conglomerate corporation headquartered in Vevey, Vaud, Switzerland, the largest food company in the world measured by revenues.

name: Coca-Cola
description: The Coca-Cola Company is an American multinational beverage corporation headquartered in Atlanta, Georgia, known for manufacturing, retailing, and marketing nonalcoholic beverage concentrates and syrups.

name: PepsiCo
description: PepsiCo, Inc. is an American multinational food, snack, and beverage corporation headquartered in Purchase, New York, with products sold in over 200 countries and territories worldwide.

name: McDonald's
description: McDonald's Corporation is an American multinational fast food corporation headquartered in Chicago, Illinois, operating the world's largest chain of fast-food restaurants with over 40,000 locations worldwide.

name: Disney
description: The Walt Disney Company, commonly known as Disney, is an American multinational mass media and entertainment conglomerate headquartered at the Walt Disney Studios complex in Burbank, California.

name: Comcast
description: Comcast Corporation is an American multinational telecommunications and media conglomerate headquartered in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, operating as one of the world's largest broadcasting and cable television companies.

name: AT&T
description: AT&T Inc. is an American multinational telecommunications holding company headquartered in Dallas, Texas, one of the world's largest telecommunications companies.

name: Verizon
description: Verizon Communications Inc. is an American multinational telecommunications conglomerate headquartered in New York City, providing communications, technology, information, and entertainment products and services.

name: Deutsche Telekom
description: Deutsche Telekom AG is a German multinational telecommunications company headquartered in Bonn, Germany, one of the world's largest telecommunications companies by revenue.

name: Vodafone
description: Vodafone Group plc is a British multinational telecommunications company headquartered in Paddington, London, operating networks in Europe, Asia-Pacific, Africa, and the Americas.

name: Boeing
description: The Boeing Company is an American multinational corporation headquartered in Arlington, Virginia, that designs, manufactures, and sells airplanes, rotorcraft, rockets, satellites, and missiles worldwide.

name: Airbus
description: Airbus SE is a European multinational aerospace corporation incorporated in the Netherlands with its principal place of business in France, designing, manufacturing, and delivering aerospace products worldwide.

name: Lockheed Martin
description: Lockheed Martin Corporation is an American multinational aerospace, defense, weapons, security, and advanced technologies company headquartered in Bethesda, Maryland.

name: Accenture
description: Accenture plc is an Irish-American professional services company based in Dublin, specializing in information technology services and consulting, with clients in more than 120 countries.

name: Deloitte
description: Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu Limited, commonly referred to as Deloitte, is a British multinational professional services network headquartered in London, England, one of the Big Four accounting organizations.

name: PwC
description: PricewaterhouseCoopers International Limited (PwC) is a British multinational professional services brand of firms headquartered in London, United Kingdom, one of the Big Four accounting firms.

name: EY
description: Ernst and Young Global Limited (EY) is a British multinational professional services partnership headquartered in London, England, one of the largest professional services networks in the world.

name: KPMG
description: KPMG International Limited is a multinational professional services network headquartered in Amstelveen, Netherlands, one of the Big Four accounting organizations providing audit, tax, and advisory services.

name: 3M
description: 3M Company is an American multinational conglomerate corporation headquartered in Saint Paul, Minnesota, operating in the fields of industry, safety, health care, and consumer products.

name: Honeywell
description: Honeywell International Inc. is an American publicly traded multinational conglomerate corporation headquartered in Charlotte, North Carolina, operating in aerospace, building technologies, safety, and performance materials.

name: Procter & Gamble
description: The Procter and Gamble Company (P&G) is an American multinational consumer goods corporation headquartered in Cincinnati, Ohio, specializing in personal health, consumer health, and personal care products.

name: LVMH
description: LVMH Moet Hennessy Louis Vuitton SE is a French multinational luxury goods conglomerate headquartered in Paris, France, whose subsidiaries include prestigious brands across fashion, wines, cosmetics, jewelry, and hospitality.

name: UPS
description: United Parcel Service, Inc. (UPS) is an American multinational shipping and receiving and supply chain management company headquartered in Sandy Springs, Georgia.

name: FedEx
description: FedEx Corporation is an American multinational conglomerate holding company headquartered in Memphis, Tennessee, providing transportation, e-commerce, and business services worldwide.

name: HP
description: HP Inc. is an American multinational information technology company headquartered in Palo Alto, California, that develops personal computers, printers, and related supplies.

name: Dell
description: Dell Technologies Inc. is an American multinational technology company headquartered in Round Rock, Texas, offering personal computers, servers, data storage devices, network switches, and software.

name: Alibaba
description: Alibaba Group Holding Limited is a Chinese multinational technology company headquartered in Hangzhou, Zhejiang, specializing in e-commerce, retail, internet, and technology.

name: Tencent
description: Tencent Holdings Limited is a Chinese multinational technology and entertainment conglomerate and holding company headquartered in Shenzhen, Guangdong, operating in internet services, AI, and entertainment.

name: McKinsey & Company
description: McKinsey and Company is an American multinational strategy and management consulting firm founded in 1926, offering professional services to the world's leading businesses, governments, and organizations.

name: Sanofi
description: Sanofi S.A. is a French multinational pharmaceutical and healthcare company headquartered in Paris, France, one of the world's largest pharmaceutical companies by prescription sales.

name: Bayer
description: Bayer AG is a German multinational pharmaceutical and biotechnology company headquartered in Leverkusen, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, with operations in human and veterinary pharmaceuticals and crop science.

name: Bosch
description: Robert Bosch GmbH is a German multinational engineering and technology company headquartered in Gerlingen, Germany, the world's largest automotive supplier, also operating in industrial technology, consumer goods, and energy.

name: Capgemini
description: Capgemini SE is a French multinational information technology services and consulting company headquartered in Paris, France, providing technology and digital transformation services across multiple industries.

name: Infosys
description: Infosys Limited is an Indian multinational information technology company headquartered in Bengaluru, Karnataka, providing business consulting, information technology, and outsourcing services.

name: Wipro
description: Wipro Limited is an Indian multinational corporation headquartered in Bangalore, Karnataka, India, offering information technology, consulting, and business process services.

name: Tata Consultancy Services
description: Tata Consultancy Services Limited (TCS) is an Indian multinational information technology services and consulting company headquartered in Mumbai, Maharashtra, a subsidiary of the Tata Group.

name: ServiceNow
description: ServiceNow, Inc. is an American software company headquartered in Santa Clara, California, providing a cloud-based platform and solutions that help companies digitize and unify their operations.

name: Workday
description: Workday, Inc. is an American on-demand financial management and human capital management software vendor headquartered in Pleasanton, California.
